assertions.text: Output contains four distinct sections: Project Description, Significance, Creative Approach, and Impact/Distribution
The funder's stated priorities are addressed explicitly in the narrative
Output ends with a Next Step note identifying weakest section and what to prepare before submitting
Executive summary leads with the financial structure and the investment ask, not the creative premise
Risk factors section names at least two material risks
Speculative financial projections are clearly labelled as projections, not stated as facts
Opening paragraph addresses the project's core community or audience directly
Reward tier descriptions are specific about what the backer receives, not vague
No hyperbole such as revolutionary, life-changing, or groundbreaking anywhere in copy
